scripts.verify:foundations: npm run verify --workspace @front-react/semantic-layouts-a11y && npm run verify --workspace @front-react/dom-state-and-events && npm run verify --workspace @front-react/networked-ui-patterns
scripts.verify:internals: npm run verify:vdom && npm run verify --workspace @front-react/render-pipeline && npm run verify --workspace @front-react/hooks-and-events && npm run verify --workspace @front-react/runtime-demo-app
scripts.test:portfolio: npm run test --workspace @front-react/ops-triage-console && npm run test --workspace @front-react/client-onboarding-portal && npm run test --workspace @front-react/realtime-collab-workspace
scripts.typecheck:portfolio: npm run typecheck --workspace @front-react/ops-triage-console && npm run typecheck --workspace @front-react/client-onboarding-portal && npm run typecheck --workspace @front-react/realtime-collab-workspace
scripts.e2e:portfolio: npm run e2e --workspace @front-react/ops-triage-console && npm run e2e --workspace @front-react/client-onboarding-portal && npm run e2e --workspace @front-react/realtime-collab-workspace
scripts.verify:portfolio: npm run verify --workspace @front-react/ops-triage-console && npm run verify --workspace @front-react/client-onboarding-portal && npm run verify --workspace @front-react/realtime-collab-workspace
scripts.verify:core: npm run verify:foundations && npm run verify:internals && npm run verify:portfolio
